AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 
184 
SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_1_CD 
LABEL: 
Supplemental HRSN Physical Activity 1: Number of Days Moderate Exercise 
DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) physical activity counting 
number days moderate exercise. 
LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_PHYS_ACTVTY_1_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
AHC data system 
VALUES: 
0 = 0 days 
1 = 1 day 
2 = 2
